---
title: Matrix factorization analyses of the immgenT scRNA-seq data
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output: workflowr::wflow_html
---

This site documents the gene program (GP) factorization analysis of the ImmGen-T
single-cell RNA-seq/CITE-seq data: ~200 GPs learned by empirical Bayes matrix
factorization (EBMF), and how they relate to cell lineage, tissue, activation
state, transcription factors, and surface protein expression.

Each page below covers one published figure: for every panel, the R code that
produced it, the figure itself, and a short caption explaining what it shows.

## Main figures

+ [Figure 1: Overview](Figure1.html)
+ [Figure 2: GPs and lineages](Figure2.html)
+ [Figure 3: GPs associated with T-cell activation](Figure3.html)
+ [Figure 4: GPs and tissue](Figure4.html)
+ [Figure 6: Linking GPs to proteins](Figure6.html)

## Supplementary figures

+ [Figure S1: GP reproducibility across IGTs](FigureS1.html)
+ [Figure S2: GP30 and GP58 loadings across T-cell subsets](FigureS2.html)
+ [Figure S3: Characterizing activation GPs](FigureS3.html)
+ [Figure S4: Healthy non-thymocyte GP mean-loading heatmaps](FigureS4.html)
+ [Figure S6: GP loadings recover protein-gated populations across GPs](FigureS6.html)

## Extended Data tables

+ [Extended Data Table 1: summary of GP characteristics and annotations](ExtendedDataTable1.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 2: GP AUC by lineage](ExtendedDataTable2.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 3: GP AUC by tissue](ExtendedDataTable3.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 4: GP AUC by cluster](ExtendedDataTable4.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 5: GP during activation](ExtendedDataTable5.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 6: protein factor matrix](ExtendedDataTable6.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 7: protein gating](ExtendedDataTable7.html)
+ [Extended Data Table 8: comprehensive gene signature matrix](ExtendedDataTable8.html)
  ([wide format](ExtendedDataTable8_wide.html))

## Methods

+ [Flashier matrix factorization](Methods_FlashierFit.html): how the gene programs were learned from the data (normalization, gene filtering, EBMF model setup)

## Reproducing these figures

Every page above is generated by a single R script in
[`script/`](https://github.com/AgueroZZ/immgenT-GP-analysis/tree/main/script),
which sources shared plotting/data-loading helpers from
[`code/R/`](https://github.com/AgueroZZ/immgenT-GP-analysis/tree/main/code/R).
To regenerate a figure yourself, run (from the repository root):

```
Rscript script/Figure1.R
```
